transfer.no_cycles_available: No other IPO Readiness available to transfer Compliance Tasks to.

success.title: IPO Readiness restored
success.description: The IPO Readiness has been restored.

failed.title: IPO Readiness restore failed
failed.description: The IPO Readiness could not be restored. Please try again.
Couldn't add the IPO Readiness to Stakeholders. Please try again.
failed.title: Error!

failed.description: Couldn't remove the IPO Readiness from Stakeholders. Please try again.
failed.title: Error!

failed.title: Error!

error.already_exists: You already have a IPO Readiness on the given dates, if you want to create a Generated Document IPO Readiness, you can do that by removing both the dates.

general.title: Group and timebox Compliance Tasks in IPO Readiness.
general.description: Break work down by timeboxed chunks, work backwards from your IPO Workspace deadline to set dates, and make tangible progress as a team.

comic.title: IPO Readiness are repetitive time-boxes.
comic.description: A sprint, an iteration, and or any other term you use for weekly or fortnightly tracking of work is a IPO Readiness.

no_issues.title: No Compliance Tasks added to the IPO Readiness
no_issues.description: Add or create Compliance Tasks you wish to timebox and deliver within this IPO Readiness

completed_no_issues.title: No Compliance Tasks in the IPO Readiness
completed_no_issues.description: No Compliance Tasks in the IPO Readiness. Compliance Tasks are either transferred or hidden. To see hidden Compliance Tasks if any, update your display properties accordingly.

active.title: No active IPO Readiness
active.description: An active IPO Readiness includes any period that encompasses today's date within its range. Find the progress and details of the active IPO Readiness here.

archived.title: No archived IPO Readiness yet
archived.description: To tidy up your IPO Workspace, archive IPO Ready IPO Readiness. Find them here once archived.

general.title: Save filtered Compliance Flags for your IPO Workspace. Create as many as you need
general.description: Compliance Flags are a set of saved filters that you use frequently or want easy access to. All your colleagues in a IPO Workspace can see everyone's Compliance Flags and choose whichever suits their needs best.

comic.title: Compliance Flags work atop Compliance Task properties.
comic.description: You can create a view from here with as many properties as filters as you see fit.

filter.title: No matching Compliance Flags
filter.description:
No Compliance Flags match the search criteria.
 Create a new view instead.

no_archived_issues.title: No archived Compliance Tasks yet
no_archived_issues.description: Manually or through automation, you can archive Compliance Tasks that are IPO Ready or cancelled. Find them here once archived.

issues_empty_filter.title: No Compliance Tasks found matching the filters applied

public.title: No public Company Records yet
public.description: See Company Records shared with everyone in your IPO Workspace right here.

archived.title: No archived Company Records yet
archived.description: Archive Company Records not on your radar. Access them here when needed.

shared.title: No shared Company Records yet
shared.description: Company Records that others have shared with you will appear here.

delete_view.title: Are you sure you want to delete this view?
delete_view.content: If you confirm, all the sort, filter, and display options + the layout you have chosen for this view will be permanently deleted without any way to restore them.

no_issues.title: Create a Compliance Task and assign it to someone, even yourself
no_issues.description: Think of Compliance Tasks as jobs, Compliance Tasks, work, or JTBD. Which we like. A Compliance Task and its sub-Compliance Tasks are usually time-based actionables assigned to members of your team. Your team creates, assigns, and completes Compliance Tasks to move your IPO Workspace towards its goal.

comic.title: Compliance Tasks are building blocks in Trinity Intelligence.
comic.description: Redesign the Trinity Intelligence UI, Rebrand the company, or Launch the new fuel injection system are examples of Compliance Tasks that likely have sub-Compliance Tasks.

no_archived_issues.title: No archived Compliance Tasks yet
no_archived_issues.description: Manually or through automation, you can archive Compliance Tasks that are IPO Ready or cancelled. Find them here once archived.

issues_empty_filter.title: No Compliance Tasks found matching the filters applied

general.title: Map your IPO Workspace milestones to Tasks and track aggregated work easily.
general.description: A group of Compliance Tasks that belong to a logical, hierarchical parent form a Task. Think of them as a way to track work by IPO Workspace milestones. They have their own periods and deadlines as well as Risk Assessment to help you see how close or far you are from a milestone.

comic.title: Tasks help group work by hierarchy.
comic.description: A cart Task, a chassis Task, and a warehouse Task are all good example of this grouping.

no_issues.title: No Compliance Tasks in the Task
no_issues.description: Create or add Compliance Tasks which you want to accomplish as part of this Task

archived.title: No archived Tasks yet
archived.description: To tidy up your IPO Workspace, archive IPO Ready or cancelled Tasks. Find them here once archived.

sidebar.invalid_date: Invalid date. Please enter valid date.

quick_actions.archive_module_description:
Only IPO Ready or canceled
Task can be archived.

general.title: Write a note, a doc, or a full knowledge base. Get Trinity's IPO Intelligence, to help you get started
general.description: Company Records are thoughts potting space in Trinity Intelligence. Take down meeting notes, format them easily, embed Compliance Tasks, lay them out using a library of components, and keep them all in your IPO Workspace's context. To make short work of any doc, invoke Galileo, Trinity's IPO Intelligence, with a shortcut or the click of a button.

private.title: No private Company Records yet
private.description: Keep your private thoughts here. When you're ready to share, the team's just a click away.

public.title: No public Company Records yet
public.description: See Company Records shared with everyone in your IPO Workspace right here.

archived.title: No archived Company Records yet
archived.description: Archive Company Records not on your radar. Access them here when needed.

inbox.title: Intake is not enabled for the IPO Workspace.
inbox.description: Intake helps you manage incoming requests to your IPO Workspace and add them as Compliance Tasks in your workflow. Enable intake from IPO Workspace Workspace Settings to manage requests.

cycle.title: IPO Readiness is not enabled for this IPO Workspace.
cycle.description: Break work down by timeboxed chunks, work backwards from your IPO Workspace deadline to set dates, and make tangible progress as a team. Enable the IPO Readiness feature for your IPO Workspace to start using them.

module.title: Tasks are not enabled for the IPO Workspace.
module.description: Tasks are the building blocks of your IPO Workspace. Enable Tasks from IPO Workspace Workspace Settings to start using them.

page.title: Company Records are not enabled for the IPO Workspace.
page.description: Company Records are the building blocks of your IPO Workspace. Enable Company Records from IPO Workspace Workspace Settings to start using them.

view.title: Compliance Flags are not enabled for the IPO Workspace.
view.description: Compliance Flags are the building blocks of your IPO Workspace. Enable Compliance Flags from IPO Workspace Workspace Settings to start using them.

members_import.title: Import Members from CSV
members_import.description: Upload a CSV with columns: Email and Role (5=Guest, 15=Member, 20=Admin). Users must already be workspace members.

dropzone.inactive: Drag & drop or click to upload

message.success: Successfully imported {count} member{plural} to the IPO Workspace.
message.no_imports: No new members were imported from the CSV file.
